# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_simple_gateway (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Object name.

### Optional

- `anti_bot` (Boolean) Anti-Bot blade enabled.
- `anti_virus` (Boolean) Anti-Virus blade enabled.
- `application_control` (Boolean) Application Control blade enabled.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `color` (String) Color of the object. Should be one of existing colors.
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `content_awareness` (Boolean) Content Awareness blade enabled. Available from R80.10 management version.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `firewall` (Boolean) Firewall blade enabled.
- `firewall_settings` (String) N/A
- `gateway_version` (String) Gateway platform version.
- `groups` (String) Collection of group identifiers.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `interfaces` (String) Network interfaces. When a gateway is updated with a new interfaces, the existing interfaces are removed.
- `ip_address` (String) IPv4 or IPv6 address. If both addresses are required use ipv4-address and ipv6-address fields explicitly.
- `ips` (Boolean) Intrusion Prevention System blade enabled.
- `ips_settings` (String) Gateway IPS settings. Available from R82 JHF management version.
- `ipv4_address` (String) IPv4 address.
- `ipv6_address` (String) IPv6 address.
- `logs_settings` (String) N/A
- `one_time_password` (String) N/A
- `os_name` (String) Gateway platform operating system.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `save_logs_locally` (Boolean) Save logs locally on the gateway.
- `send_alerts_to_server` (String) Server(s) to send alerts to.
- `send_logs_to_backup_server` (String) Backup server(s) to send logs to.
- `send_logs_to_server` (String) Server(s) to send logs to.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `threat_emulation` (Boolean) Threat Emulation blade enabled.
- `threat_extraction` (Boolean) Threat Extraction blade enabled. Available from R80.20.M2 management version.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `url_filtering` (Boolean) URL Filtering blade enabled.
- `vpn` (Boolean) VPN blade enabled.
- `vpn_settings` (String) Gateway VPN settings.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_simple_gateway` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
